debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

failed_attempts:
induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro i hi
    contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro i hi cs h0 h1
    have h_split : args = Vector.cons args.head args.tail := by
      ext m
      cases m using Fin.cases <;> simp
    rw [h_split] at h0 h1 ⊢
    unfold assert_bits_e
    simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
    rw [← assert_bits_e]
    by_cases hz : i = 0
    · rw [hz] at h0 h1
      simp only [Vector.get_cons_zero] at h0 h1
      have h_bad : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro z
        simp only [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
        cases z
        · contradiction
        · apply h1; symm; assumption
      have h_fail : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, if_neg h_bad]
      generalize h_c : assert_bit_e cs args.head = c
      rw [h_c] at h_fail
      clear ih h0 h1 hi h_split hz h_bad
      induction w with
      | zero => simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, List.foldl] at *; exact h_fail
      | succ w ih' =>
        unfold assert_bits_e
        simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
        rw [← assert_bits_e]
        apply ih'
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_fail]
    · have : i = (i - 1) + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hz)).symm
      rw [this] at h0 h1
      simp only [Vector.get_cons_succ] at h0 h1
      apply ih (i - 1)
      · apply Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ
        rw [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, ←this]
        exact hi
      · exact h0
      · exact h1
